title: Figure 1 in Lectin histochemistry of Kudoa septempunctata genotype ST3-infected muscle of olive flounder (Paralichthys olivaceus)
author: Kang, Jaeyoun
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. PCR amplification of the mitochondrial gene fragments (715 and 817 bp) from Kudoa septempunctata (in triplicate). Lanes: 1; SiZerTM-100 bp DNA Marker (iNtRON, Korea), 2–4; cox 1 gene, 5; negative control, 6; positive control, 7; Molecular size marker, 8– 10, rnl gene, 11; negative control (no DNA), 12; positive control, 13; M:SiZerTM-100 bp DNA Marker.

Lanes: 1; SiZerTM-100 bp DNA Marker (iNtRON, Korea), 2–4; cox 1 gene, 5; negative control, 6; positive control, 7; Molecular size marker, 8– 10, rnl gene, 11; negative control (no DNA), 12; positive control, 13; M:SiZerTM-100 bp DNA Marker.
